purpose: Offline NPC voice-profile scanning and speech-simulation prompt/profile generation.
primaryFormula: V_final = V_neutral + λ_b·B_biome + λ_r·R_race + λ_c·C_class + λ_s·S_subclass + λ_g·G_gender + ε_personality
durationFormula: D_i′ = D_i × M_biome × M_race × M_class × M_subclass × M_gender × (1 + ε_i)

mergeRules.absoluteNumericParameters: Blend from neutral toward layer value by λ: final = final + λ × (layerValue - neutralValue).
mergeRules.multiplicativeParameters: For paceMultiplier, formantScale, and vowelLengthMultiplier, multiply ratios against neutral by weighted exponent.
mergeRules.subclassDeltaParameters: Apply subclass parametersDelta additively by λ_s after class parameters.
mergeRules.clamping: Clamp normalized textures to 0–1, multipliers to practical TTS-safe ranges, and semitone shifts to fantasy-performance-safe ranges.

safetyNotes: The scanner is for fictional NPC voice direction and synthetic speech simulation only.
Gender/race/species/culture settings are optional creative controls, not claims about real people.
No external TTS engine code is bundled; docs record audits and license notes only.
